stemHtml: When flying in the Northern Hemisphere, to counteract the turning errors of the direct reading compass you must…

options.a: roll out early when turning from 070° to 110°
options.b: roll out late when turning from 070° to 110°
options.c: roll out early when turning from 330° to 040°
options.d: roll out late when turning from 330° to 040°
